ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the task */,
  "custom_value_1" TEXT /* Custom field 1 for additional attributes */,
  "custom_value_2" INTEGER /* Custom field 2 for additional attributes */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time for the task execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time for the task execution */,
  "parent_task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent task if applicable */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "estimated_time" INTEGER /* Estimated time in minutes or hours to complete the task */,
  "actual_time" INTEGER /* Actual time spent on the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_parent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee works */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the employee record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment record */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee to whom the task is assigned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was assigned */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was marked as completed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or summary contained in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., 'Task Performance', 'Project Overview') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Manager, Employee) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
